=== Refactor Inventory ===

  Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" (refactor.rewrite.effect.wrapWithPipe)
  Refactor 1: "Generate Effect.Schema from type" (refactor.rewrite.effect.typeToEffectSchema)
  Refactor 2: "Generate Schema.Class from type" (refactor.rewrite.effect.typeToEffectSchemaClass)
  Refactor 3: "Refactor to Schema (Recursive Structural)" (refactor.rewrite.effect.structuralTypeToSchema)

[R2] selection: "empty (0:0-0:0)"
  (no refactors)

=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_typeAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 5:13-5:19
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export type pipe(MyType) = {
  name: string
  age: number
  isActive: boolean
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Generate Effect.Schema from type" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_typeAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 5:13-5:19
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export const MyType = Schema.Struct({
    name: Schema.String,
    age: Schema.Number,
    isActive: Schema.Boolean
});

export type MyType = {
  name: string
  age: number
  isActive: boolean
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Generate Schema.Class from type" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_typeAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 5:13-5:19
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class MyType extends Schema.Class<MyType>("MyType")({
    name: Schema.String,
    age: Schema.Number,
    isActive: Schema.Boolean
}) {}

export type MyType = {
  name: string
  age: number
  isActive: boolean
}


=== [R1] Refactor 3: "Refactor to Schema (Recursive Structural)" ===

--- file:///.src/structuralTypeToSchema_typeAlias.ts ---
// refactor: 5:13-5:19
// @effect-v3
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

export class MyType extends Schema.Class<MyType>("MyType")({
    name: Schema.String,
    age: Schema.Number,
    isActive: Schema.Boolean
}) {}

export type MyType = {
  name: string
  age: number
  isActive: boolean
}
